message:
Add GITHUB_TOKEN env var to Build step

The nix/update-plugins.sh script requires GH_TOKEN or GITHUB_TOKEN
to be set in order to fetch the tenzir-plugins source tarball from
GitHub.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -124,6 +124,8 @@ jobs:
       # =========================================================================
       - name: Build
         id: build
+        env:
+          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
         run: |
           release_flag=""
           if [[ "${{ github.event_name }}" == "release" ]]; then
